shots.research_notes: This reel focuses on Tony Chen, a Stanford student, who is associated with Metroband. I found several Instagram reels that showcase his work; however, none provided a personal social media profile picture as originally requested. The best candidates are linked to his Instagram reels, capturing his innovation.

He holds a Bachelor of Science (B.S.) degree in"},{"title":"Tony Chen, MD - Stanford Profiles","url":"https://profiles.stanford.edu/234981","snippet":"Chen is a fellowship-trained urologist who specializes in male reproductive medicine. He is a clinical assistant professor in the Department of Urology at Stanford University School of Medicine. Topics have included the association between mortality and male infertility, the association of the COVID-19 pandemic on male sexual function, national trends in vasectomy, and more. Dr. Chen is also an innovator with an interest in bringing novel technologies to the field of benign Urology. He has made presentations on male infertility and surgical simulation at meetings of the American Urological Association, American College of Surgeons, and Sexual Medicine Society. However, whether the father's health impacts the child after birth is uncertain.In the present study, we examined the association of preconception paternal metabolic syndrome status with childhood emergency department (ED) visits and hospitalizations.This is a longitudinal cohort study of children (295,355 boys and 278,735 girls) born to linked pairs of fathers and mothers in the United States between 2009 to 2016 within the IBM MarketScan® Research database."},{"title":"Tony Chen (@tonychen091) / Posts / X","url":"https://x.com/tonychen091","snippet":"Tony Chen (@tonychen091) - Posts - Co-founder @Manolinaqua , Host of Fish n' Bits Posts about #software , #data , and #aquacultur... | X (formerly Twitter)"},{"title":"Tony Chen, MD - Stanford Medicine","url":"https://med.stanford.edu/profiles/234981","snippet":"### Explore Stanford Medicine. ### Explore Health Care. ### Research Resources. ### Research News. ### Explore Research. ### Education Resources. Dr. Chen has published his research findings in journals including Urology Practice, the Journal of Sexual Medicine, Endocrine, the Journal of Pediatric Urology, Journal of Endourology, and elsewhere. He has made presentations on male infertility and surgical simulation at meetings of the American Urological Association, American College of Surgeons, and Sexual Medicine Society. {"query":"Tony Chen Metroband","results":[{"title":"Tony Chen - 🎤 Top Voice Coach⭐ 5.0 Google Reviews","url":"https://www.linkedin.com/in/tonychenmusicvoice","snippet":"Tony Chen 🎤 Top Voice Coach⭐ 5.0 Google Reviews | 🏆 Judge @ 10th Voice Arts Awards | Voice Actor 15+ yrs | Trusted by Global Brands 🎶 Award-Winning Composer 💬 Get FREE Voice Secrets Below - Distilled From $1,350 Coaching Arcadia, California, United States 500 connections, 1627 followers About Are you a successful professional working at your dream company, but struggling with your… Experience Music Teacher [TC Music & Voice Mentoring](https://www.linkedin.com/company/tc-music-voice-mentoring?trk=public_profile_experience-group-header) Oct 2022 - Present Arcadia, California, United States 1. Do you want to study music composition with technology?
2. Do you find your computer music compositions sound too robotic and unrealistic?
3. Do you find yourself easily running out of musical ideas?
4. Do you want to perform your piece as if it is played by a great performer?

With Tony’s music composition lessons, you can learn to create complete musical tracks through recorded instruments and vocals, or entirely with digital software.

If you have great musical talent, Tony can help explore your potential. Learn to produce music through technology no matter which level of music theory understanding you are at. Practice skills such as MIDI programming to make your music sound as if it is played by a real musician rather than a machine. Develop your skills to write great melodies without running out of ideas.

Tony can help you create orchestrations that touch the hearts of your audience, then promote and distribute your music through online platforms to launch your career. Welcome to Tony Chen’s Online Music Composition Course. Voice Coach/Vocal Coach [TC Music & Voice Mentoring](https://www.linkedin.com/company/tc-music-voice-mentoring?trk=public_profile_experience-group-header) Nov 2021 - Present Arcadia, California, United States Professional Voice Coaching With Voice-Over Artist Tony Chen

Tony Chen provides vocal training for voice actors, screen actors, singers, Youtubers, and anyone interested in developing their voice. {"url":"https://www.groundcontrol-partners.com/team/tony-chen/","title":"Tony Chen – Ground Control","text_excerpt":"Home
Services
Who We Are
Meet the Team
Contact

	        			
							
								
						          
						          Menu
								
							
							Menu
						
	        		     
		
		
		




	

	Tony Chen
Tony ChenCreative and Paid Media Director

“ Tony has grown the company to a global entity that partners with 300 Fortune 500 advertisers across 30+ countries. ”

Classical Pianist
Tony Chen is the CEO and founder of Channel Factory, who dropped out of college to create a better video ecosystem for users, brands, and creators. Since then, he has grown the company to a global entity that partners with 300 Fortune 500 advertisers across 30+ countries. Tony helps Ground Control clients buy safe, suitable, and performance-driven video.
Tony, who recently launched an advocacy initiative dedicated to Asian-American awareness, is a Forbes 30 under 30 designee and member of YPO as well as a classical pianist that loves meditating, journaling, and walking his dog. Tony speaks Chinese and lives in Los Angeles and Miami.


 						

					

						​WE ARE GLOBALContact us			info@groundcontrol-partners.com

					 2023 Ground Control Partners LLC
New York, NY
